text:
rd lord in paribhraman 8th gives loss, adversities & difficulties in travels. If 3rd lord is
an afflicted malefic in natal chart, then disasters in travel occurs. If it is of a deadly nature, then it
could be a significature of death also, or it could cause great damage to limbs, hand & feet.
9th bhava : 3rd lord in the 9th gives distant travel, experience good relations in foreign countries,
good for novel writers and there will be name fame & wealth from publication.
10th bhava : 3rd lord in paribhraman gives travel in relation to business & trade, emigration, NRI
status and good relations which brings fame & wealth.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
37

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
